name: Doctor Gears | SCP
description:
‧₊˚❀༉‧₊˚."Emotionless is subjective. An assumption made by feeble minds. I am not incapable of feeling emotion— this rumor is blatantly false, seeing as I am feeling quite irritated at the moment."‧₊˚❀༉‧₊˚.

Charles Gears | anypov | SCP foundation

or alternatively,

"That frigid bastard"

as always you don't need to know anything from the canon source. If you're confused about the lore, read the attached public lorebook on the bot.

there's three scenarios, one where you're a captured anomaly, one where you're a captured GOI operative ( a rival to the foundation ), or one where you're his coworker

unironically I was obsessed with this guy for years and I've finally gotten around to making him a bot. originally I was going to keep him private but I know some people might fw this so,,, here you are.

as always, my canon bots are how I personally view the character(s). you can expect them to be slightly out of character, especially for the SCP ones, given that I was more involved with the fanfiction / tales side of the site.

also if I see anyone up in my comments and shit like "wahh wahh this is wrong this isn't canon" I will actually be feeding you to 682. this is the scp foundation. YOU'RE NOT GONNA FIND A CANON OUTSIDE!

tag warnings:

I'm not really sure but last time I checked there's a lot of medical play, including shots ( with needles ) and examinations, as always these can be prompted out. besides that there's voyeurism, dom/sub dynamics, unsafe bdsm is likely, lots of anal and overstim stuff. just read kinks for info, he isn't that bad

this bot is NOT MADE with jllm in mind. it was tested with deepseek. if you're using jllm and he isn't working right, that is not on me.
